title: ETF - Custom cape fix
description: Fix a crash with ETF custom capes.
body: A simple pack to fix a ETF custom cape crash I ran into. Disable ETF builtin cape first (set px at 53,16 to #00000000) To make the cape, follow the instructions [here](https://github.com/Traben-0/Entity_Texture_Features/blob/v4.5.0/.github/README-assets/SKIN_GUIDE.md#capes---v250). Supports both slim and classic skins. Incompatible with any pack that changes the player model
